data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for parallel signature routing.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the parallel signature routing (Party A and B simultaneously, then C). However, the evidence provided does not include any API endpoints or mechanisms that enforce this routing behavior. The linked use case describes a sequential workflow without confirming the existence of parallel routing, leading to an inconclusive assessment.
evidencePointers: The Multi-Party Sign-Off Workflow description lacks explicit confirmation of parallel routing.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or mechanisms enforcing parallel signature routing.
